subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was noted, and glad tidings were received of the progress and spread of the Cause in Sarvistan [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه مسطور ملحوظ شد مژده ترقی و انتشار امر در سروستان داده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort
